name: Graft Tree
purpose: Adds an extra branch for every item, pushing data deeper into the tree.

name: Flatten Tree
purpose: Removes all branching, collapsing a tree into a single list.

name: Simplify Tree
purpose: Removes shared/overlapping path segments to clean redundant nesting.

name: Unflatten Tree
purpose: Restores a tree's branch structure using a guide tree.

name: Entwine
purpose: Combines multiple data streams into one tree, each input as a branch.

name: Merge
purpose: Merges several data streams into one flattened-per-input stream.

name: Explode Tree
purpose: Splits a tree's branches out into separate numbered outputs.

name: Trim Tree
purpose: Removes the deepest path levels, merging branches upward.

name: Prune Tree
purpose: Removes branches deeper or shallower than given depths.

name: Clean Tree
purpose: Removes null and/or empty items and branches from a tree.

name: Match Tree
purpose: Matches one tree's structure to a guide tree.

name: Flip Matrix
purpose: Swaps branch paths and item indices (transposes a 2-level tree).

name: Shift Paths
purpose: Shifts the path indices of a tree's branches up or down.

name: Path Mapper
purpose: Rewrites tree paths via a lexical source->target mapping mask.

name: Tree Branch
purpose: Retrieves a single branch of a tree by its path.

name: Tree Item
purpose: Retrieves a specific item from a tree by path and index.

name: Tree Statistics
purpose: Reports a tree's paths, branch lengths, and total branch count.

name: Construct Path
purpose: Builds a tree path from a list of integer indices.

name: Deconstruct Path
purpose: Splits a tree path into its integer index components.

name: Relative Item
purpose: Retrieves items at a relative offset within/across branches.

name: Replace Paths
purpose: Replaces matching tree paths with new paths via search masks.

name: Split Tree
purpose: Splits a tree into two parts using path masks.

name: Stream Filter
purpose: Selects one of several input streams by index gate.

name: Stream Gate
purpose: Routes a single input stream to one of several outputs by index.

name: Path Compare
purpose: Tests tree paths against a comparison mask.

name: Dispatch
purpose: Splits a list into two by a boolean pattern.

name: Partition List
purpose: Partitions a list into sublists of given size(s).

name: Weave
purpose: Interleaves multiple lists using a weaving pattern.

name: Cross Reference
purpose: Generates all combinations across multiple lists (matrix pairing).

name: Shift List
purpose: Offsets list items by N, with optional wrap.

name: Sort List
purpose: Sorts a list of keys and reorders parallel value lists to match.

name: List Item
purpose: Retrieves item(s) from a list at given index/indices.

name: List Length
purpose: Returns the number of items in a list.

name: Item Index
purpose: Finds the index of the first matching item in a list.

name: Reverse List
purpose: Reverses the order of items in a list.

name: Insert Items
purpose: Inserts items into a list at specified indices.

name: Replace Items
purpose: Replaces list items at specified indices with new values.

name: Sub List
purpose: Extracts a contiguous subset of a list by domain.

name: Split List
purpose: Splits a list into two at a given index.

name: Combine Data
purpose: Combines streams, filling nulls from later inputs.

name: Shortest List
purpose: Trims multiple lists to the length of the shortest.

name: Longest List
purpose: Extends multiple lists to the length of the longest.

name: Pick'n'Choose
purpose: Selects items from multiple lists using a pattern mask.

name: Sift Pattern
purpose: Distributes list items into multiple outputs by a pattern.

name: Null Item
purpose: Tests whether list items are null or invalid.

name: Replace Nulls
purpose: Replaces null items in a list with given values.

name: Cull Pattern
purpose: Removes list items according to a repeating boolean pattern.

name: Cull Index
purpose: Removes list items at specified indices.

name: Cull Nth
purpose: Removes every Nth item from a list.

name: Range
purpose: Divides a numeric domain into equally spaced values.

name: Series
purpose: Generates a series of numbers from start, step, and count.

name: Random
purpose: Generates pseudo-random numbers within a domain.

name: Random Reduce
purpose: Randomly removes a number of items from a list.

name: Jitter
purpose: Randomly shuffles the order of a list.

name: Repeat Data
purpose: Repeats a data list up to a target length.

name: Duplicate Data
purpose: Duplicates a data list a given number of times.

name: Stack Data
purpose: Duplicates each item N times in place.

name: Char Sequence
purpose: Generates a sequence of characters from a pattern.

name: Fibonacci
purpose: Generates a Fibonacci number sequence.

name: Create Set
purpose: Creates the set of unique values from a list.

name: Set Union
purpose: Returns the union of two sets.

name: Set Intersection
purpose: Returns elements common to two sets.

name: Set Difference
purpose: Returns elements in set A not in set B.

name: Member Index
purpose: Finds indices where a member occurs in a set.

name: Delete Consecutive
purpose: Removes consecutive duplicate values from a list.

name: Key/Value Search
purpose: Looks up values by key in parallel key/value lists.

name: Concatenate
purpose: Joins multiple text fragments into one string.

name: Text Split
purpose: Splits text into fragments at given separators.

name: Text Join
purpose: Joins a list of text using a separator/glue.

name: Format
purpose: Formats values into text using a format string.

name: Replace Text
purpose: Replaces occurrences of substrings within text.

name: Match Text
purpose: Tests text against a search/regex pattern.

name: Expression
purpose: Evaluates a single math/string expression on named inputs.

name: Evaluate
purpose: Evaluates a free-form expression with variable inputs.

name: C# Script
purpose: Runs custom C#.NET code as a scriptable component.

name: GhPython Script
purpose: Runs custom Python script as a component (IronPython 2).

name: VB Script
purpose: Runs custom VB.NET code as a scriptable component.

name: Bounds
purpose: Returns the numeric domain spanning a list of numbers.

name: Bounds 2D
purpose: Returns the 2D domain bounding a set of UV/point values.

name: Construct Domain
purpose: Builds a numeric domain from min and max values.

name: Deconstruct Domain
purpose: Splits a domain into its start and end values.

name: Divide Domain
purpose: Divides a domain into a number of equal subdomains.

name: Includes
purpose: Tests whether a value falls within a domain.

name: Remap Numbers
purpose: Maps numbers from a source domain to a target domain.

name: Find Domain
purpose: Finds which of several domains contains a value.

name: Gate And
purpose: Logical AND of two boolean inputs.

name: Gate Or
purpose: Logical OR of two boolean inputs.

name: Gate Not
purpose: Logical NOT (inverts) a boolean input.

name: Gate Xor
purpose: Logical exclusive-OR of two boolean inputs.

name: Gate Nand
purpose: Logical NAND of two boolean inputs.

name: Gate Nor
purpose: Logical NOR of two boolean inputs.

name: Gate Xnor
purpose: Logical XNOR (equality) of two boolean inputs.

name: Gate Majority
purpose: Returns the majority boolean among three inputs.

name: Larger Than
purpose: Tests whether A is greater than B.

name: Smaller Than
purpose: Tests whether A is less than B.

name: Equality
purpose: Tests equality/inequality of two values.

name: Mass Addition
purpose: Sums all values in a list, with partial results.

name: Mass Multiplication
purpose: Multiplies all values in a list together.

name: Modulus
purpose: Returns the remainder of A divided by B.

name: Clamp
purpose: Limits a number to lie within a domain.

name: Round
purpose: Rounds numbers to nearest, floor, and ceiling.

name: Minimum
purpose: Returns the smaller of two values.

name: Maximum
purpose: Returns the larger of two values.

name: Average
purpose: Returns the arithmetic mean of a list of numbers.

name: Construct Point
purpose: Builds a point from X, Y, Z coordinates.

name: Deconstruct
purpose: Extracts X, Y, Z coordinates from a point.

name: Distance
purpose: Measures the distance between two points.

name: Closest Point
purpose: Finds the closest point in a cloud to a given point.

name: Closest Points
purpose: Finds the N closest points in a cloud to a given point.

name: Sort Points
purpose: Sorts points along an axis order.

name: Cull Duplicates
purpose: Removes duplicate points within a tolerance.

name: Pull Point
purpose: Pulls a point to the closest position on geometry.

name: Project Point
purpose: Projects points onto geometry along a direction.

name: Point Polar
purpose: Builds a point from polar (angle/radius) coordinates.

name: Numbers to Points
purpose: Converts flat number lists into points.

name: Construct Plane
purpose: Builds a plane from origin and X/Y axis vectors.

name: Deconstruct Plane
purpose: Extracts origin and axes from a plane.

name: XY Plane
purpose: Creates a world XY plane at a given origin.

name: Plane Normal
purpose: Builds a plane from an origin and normal vector.

name: Plane 3Pt
purpose: Builds a plane through three points.

name: Plane Origin
purpose: Re-origins a plane to a new point.

name: Align Plane
purpose: Aligns a plane's axes to a guide direction.

name: Rotate Plane
purpose: Rotates a plane about its normal by an angle.

name: Plane Coordinates
purpose: Returns a point's coordinates in a plane's axis system.

name: Unit X
purpose: Returns the world X unit vector scaled by a factor.

name: Unit Y
purpose: Returns the world Y unit vector scaled by a factor.

name: Unit Z
purpose: Returns the world Z unit vector scaled by a factor.

name: Vector 2Pt
purpose: Builds a vector between two points.

name: Vector XYZ
purpose: Builds a vector from X, Y, Z components.

name: Unit Vector
purpose: Normalizes a vector to unit length.

name: Amplitude
purpose: Sets a vector's length to a given amplitude.

name: Cross Product
purpose: Returns the vector perpendicular to two vectors.

name: Dot Product
purpose: Returns the scalar dot product of two vectors.

name: Angle
purpose: Measures the angle between two vectors.

name: Rectangular
purpose: Generates a rectangular grid of points/cells.

name: Square
purpose: Generates a square grid of points/cells.

name: Hexagonal
purpose: Generates a hexagonal grid of cells.

name: Populate 2D
purpose: Scatters points randomly within a 2D region.

name: Populate 3D
purpose: Scatters points randomly within a 3D box.

name: Evaluate Curve
purpose: Evaluates a curve at a normalized parameter.

name: Curve Closest Point
purpose: Finds the closest point on a curve to a test point.

name: Length
purpose: Measures the total length of a curve.

name: End Points
purpose: Returns the start and end points of a curve.

name: Control Points
purpose: Returns the control points of a NURBS curve.

name: Curve Domain
purpose: Returns or sets the parametric domain of a curve.

name: Discontinuity
purpose: Finds discontinuity (kink) points on a curve.

name: Point In Curve
purpose: Tests whether a point lies inside a closed curve.

name: Divide Curve
purpose: Divides a curve into equal-count segments returning points.

name: Divide Length
purpose: Divides a curve into segments of equal length.

name: Divide Distance
purpose: Divides a curve by straight-line chord distance.

name: Shatter
purpose: Splits a curve at given parameters into pieces.

name: Contour
purpose: Creates parallel contour curves across geometry.

name: Perp Frames
purpose: Generates perpendicular frame planes along a curve.

name: Polygon
purpose: Creates a regular polygon from plane, radius, and sides.

name: Circle
purpose: Creates a circle from a plane and radius.

name: Circle CNR
purpose: Creates a circle from center, normal, and radius.

name: Line SDL
purpose: Creates a line from start, direction, and length.

name: Rectangle
purpose: Creates a rectangle from a plane and two domains.

name: Arc
purpose: Creates an arc from a plane, radius, and angle domain.

name: Arc 3Pt
purpose: Creates an arc through three points.

name: Interpolate
purpose: Builds an interpolated NURBS curve through points.

name: Nurbs Curve
purpose: Builds a NURBS curve from control points and degree.

name: PolyLine
purpose: Builds a polyline through a sequence of points.

name: Kinky Curve
purpose: Builds an interpolated curve allowing sharp kinks.

name: Offset Curve
purpose: Offsets a curve by a distance in its plane.

name: Join Curves
purpose: Joins touching curves into polycurves.

name: Explode
purpose: Explodes a curve into its constituent segments.

name: Fillet
purpose: Fillets curve corners with a given radius.

name: Flip Curve
purpose: Reverses a curve's direction, optionally to match a guide.

name: Project
purpose: Projects curves onto a Brep along a direction.

name: Pull Curve
purpose: Pulls a curve onto a surface.

name: Region Union
purpose: Boolean-unions overlapping planar regions.

name: Region Difference
purpose: Subtracts one planar region from another.

name: Boundary Surfaces
purpose: Creates planar surfaces from closed boundary curves.

name: Loft
purpose: Lofts a surface through a set of section curves.

name: Extrude
purpose: Extrudes a curve or surface along a vector.

name: Extrude Linear
purpose: Extrudes geometry between two guide rails/directions.

name: Sweep1
purpose: Sweeps a section along a single rail curve.

name: Sweep2
purpose: Sweeps a section along two rail curves.

name: Pipe
purpose: Creates a pipe surface around a curve at a radius.

name: Revolution
purpose: Revolves a profile curve around an axis.

name: Patch
purpose: Fits a surface patch through curves and points.

name: Edge Surface
purpose: Builds a surface from 2-4 edge curves.

name: Network Surface
purpose: Builds a surface from a network of crossing curves.

name: Bounding Box
purpose: Computes the axis-aligned bounding box of geometry.

name: Center Box
purpose: Creates a box centered on a plane with X/Y/Z sizes.

name: Box 2Pt
purpose: Creates a box from two diagonal corner points.

name: Plane Surface
purpose: Creates a rectangular planar surface from a plane.

name: Sphere
purpose: Creates a sphere from a plane and radius.

name: Cylinder
purpose: Creates a cylinder from a base plane, radius, length.

name: Evaluate Surface
purpose: Evaluates a surface at a UV parameter.

name: Surface Closest Point
purpose: Finds the closest UV point on a surface to a test point.

name: Deconstruct Brep
purpose: Splits a Brep into its faces, edges, and vertices.

name: Brep Edges
purpose: Extracts edge curves from a Brep, grouped by type.

name: Area
purpose: Computes area and centroid of a surface or region.

name: Volume
purpose: Computes volume and centroid of a closed solid.

name: Point In Brep
purpose: Tests whether a point lies inside a closed Brep.

name: Surface Curvature
purpose: Evaluates curvature and frame at a surface UV point.

name: Isotrim
purpose: Extracts an isoparametric subsurface from a UV domain.

name: Divide Surface
purpose: Divides a surface into a UV grid of points.

name: Surface Frames
purpose: Generates a UV grid of frame planes on a surface.

name: Offset Surface
purpose: Offsets a surface by a distance along its normal.

name: Cap Holes
purpose: Caps planar openings in an open Brep.

name: Brep Join
purpose: Joins adjacent Breps into a single Brep.

name: Merge Faces
purpose: Merges coplanar faces of a Brep.

name: SubD from Mesh
purpose: Creates a SubD object from a mesh.

name: Mesh from SubD
purpose: Converts a SubD into a mesh.

name: SubD Control Polygon
purpose: Extracts the control polygon of a SubD.

name: SubD Edges
purpose: Extracts edges from a SubD by tag.

name: Construct Mesh
purpose: Builds a mesh from vertices, faces, and colors.

name: Deconstruct Mesh
purpose: Splits a mesh into vertices, faces, colors, normals.

name: Mesh Box
purpose: Creates a meshed box with given subdivisions.

name: Mesh Sphere
purpose: Creates a meshed sphere with U/V subdivisions.

name: Mesh Plane
purpose: Creates a meshed planar grid from a rectangle.

name: Mesh Surface
purpose: Meshes a surface using U/V counts.

name: Mesh Brep
purpose: Meshes a Brep using meshing settings.

name: Mesh Join
purpose: Joins multiple meshes into one mesh.

name: Weld Mesh
purpose: Welds mesh vertices within an angle threshold.

name: Mesh Closest Point
purpose: Finds the closest point and face on a mesh.

name: Face Normals
purpose: Returns face center points and normal vectors.

name: Mesh Edges
purpose: Returns naked, clothed, and interior mesh edges.

name: Delaunay Mesh
purpose: Builds a Delaunay-triangulated mesh from points.

name: Voronoi
purpose: Generates 2D Voronoi cells from points.

name: Convex Hull
purpose: Computes the convex hull of a set of points.

name: Quad Remesh
purpose: Remeshes geometry into a clean quad-dominant mesh.

name: Curve | Curve
purpose: Finds intersection points/overlaps between two curves.

name: Brep | Brep
purpose: Computes intersection curves between two Breps.

name: Brep | Curve
purpose: Intersects a curve with a Brep, returning points/curves.

name: Brep | Plane
purpose: Intersects a Brep with a plane, returning section curves.

name: Mesh | Plane
purpose: Intersects a mesh with a plane, returning polylines.

name: Curve | Plane
purpose: Finds intersection points of a curve and a plane.

name: Surface Split
purpose: Splits a surface with cutting curves.

name: Solid Union
purpose: Boolean-unions multiple solids.

name: Solid Difference
purpose: Boolean-subtracts solids from a base solid.

name: Solid Intersection
purpose: Returns the boolean intersection of two solids.

name: Trim Solid
purpose: Trims a solid with cutter geometry.

name: Split Brep
purpose: Splits a Brep with cutting geometry.

name: Boundary Volume
purpose: Builds a closed solid from boundary surfaces.

name: Mesh | Mesh
purpose: Computes intersection polylines between two meshes.

name: Clash
purpose: Detects clashes/collisions between geometry sets.

name: Trim with Brep
purpose: Trims geometry, keeping the part outside a Brep.

name: Split with Breps
purpose: Splits geometry using multiple Breps.

name: IsoVist
purpose: Computes radial sightlines from a point against obstacles.

name: Move
purpose: Translates geometry by a motion vector.

name: Rotate
purpose: Rotates geometry about a plane by an angle.

name: Rotate Axis
purpose: Rotates geometry about an arbitrary axis line.

name: Mirror
purpose: Mirrors geometry across a plane.

name: Scale
purpose: Scales geometry uniformly about a center point.

name: Scale NU
purpose: Scales geometry non-uniformly along plane axes.

name: Orient
purpose: Reorients geometry from a source to a target plane.

name: Move To Plane
purpose: Moves geometry onto a target plane.

name: Linear Array
purpose: Copies geometry along a direction at a count.

name: Rectangular Array
purpose: Copies geometry into a 2D grid of cells.

name: Polar Array
purpose: Copies geometry radially around a plane.

name: Box Array
purpose: Copies geometry into a 3D grid of cells.

name: Curve Array
purpose: Copies geometry along a curve.

name: Box Morph
purpose: Morphs geometry from a bounding box into a twisted box.

name: Surface Morph
purpose: Maps geometry from a box onto a surface UVW space.

name: Map to Surface
purpose: Maps curves from one surface onto another.

name: Flow
purpose: Flows geometry from a base curve onto a target curve.

name: Group
purpose: Groups objects together as a single group.

name: Ungroup
purpose: Breaks a group into its member objects.

name: Colour RGB
purpose: Builds a colour from red, green, blue (and alpha).

name: Colour HSL
purpose: Builds a colour from hue, saturation, luminance.

name: Split ARGB
purpose: Splits a colour into alpha, red, green, blue channels.

name: Gradient
purpose: Maps numeric values to colours along a gradient.

name: Custom Preview
purpose: Previews geometry with a custom colour/material.

name: Create Material
purpose: Creates a display material with colour and transparency.

name: Text Tag
purpose: Draws 2D text tags at points in the viewport.

name: Text Tag 3D
purpose: Draws oriented 3D text tags in the viewport.

name: Legend
purpose: Draws a colour legend for a value range.

name: Point List
purpose: Displays point indices and order in the viewport.

name: Vector Display
purpose: Draws vectors as arrows from anchor points.

name: Dot Display
purpose: Displays coloured dots at points with size control.

name: Number Slider
purpose: Provides an interactive numeric input value.

name: Panel
purpose: Displays or inputs text/data as a panel.

name: Boolean Toggle
purpose: Provides a true/false toggle input.

name: Value List
purpose: Provides a dropdown/list of preset selectable values.

name: Graph Mapper
purpose: Remaps values through an editable function graph.

name: MD Slider
purpose: Provides a multi-dimensional (2D) slider input.

name: Gene Pool
purpose: Provides a bank of sliders as a number list.

name: Data Dam
purpose: Delays data flow downstream by a set time.

name: Cluster
purpose: Encapsulates a group of components as a reusable cluster.

name: Relay
purpose: Passes data through to tidy up wires.

name: Image Sampler
purpose: Samples colour/brightness values from an image by UV.

name: Geometry Pipeline
purpose: References Rhino geometry by layer/name filters live.

name: Geometry
purpose: References geometry from the Rhino document.

name: Query Model Objects
purpose: Queries the active Rhino document for model objects by filter.

name: Model Object
purpose: Constructs/deconstructs a Rhino model object with attributes.

name: Explode Object
purpose: Splits a model object into geometry and attributes.

name: Display Colour
purpose: Sets a model object's display colour attribute.

name: Render Material
purpose: Assigns a render material to a model object.

name: Object Linetype
purpose: Sets a model object's linetype attribute.

name: Visibility Attributes
purpose: Sets visibility/hidden attributes on a model object.

name: Query Model Layers
purpose: Queries the Rhino document for its layers.

name: Model Layer
purpose: Constructs/deconstructs a Rhino layer with properties.

name: Query Model Block Definitions
purpose: Queries the Rhino document for block definitions.

name: Model Block Instance
purpose: Constructs/deconstructs a block instance reference.

name: Model Block Definition
purpose: Constructs/deconstructs a block definition.

name: Query Model Materials
purpose: Queries the Rhino document for its materials.

name: Model Material
purpose: Constructs/deconstructs a Rhino render material.

name: Content Cache
purpose: Caches referenced document content for stable downstream use.

name: Import Content
purpose: Imports geometry/content from an external file.

name: User Text
purpose: Reads/writes user-text key/value attributes on objects.

name: Linear Dimension
purpose: Creates a linear dimension annotation entity.

name: Aligned Dimension
purpose: Creates an aligned dimension annotation entity.

name: Radial Dimension
purpose: Creates a radial dimension annotation entity.

name: Angle Dimension (Points)
purpose: Creates an angular dimension from points.

name: Leader
purpose: Creates a leader annotation with text.

name: Text Entity
purpose: Creates a text annotation entity in model space.

name: Text Dot
purpose: Creates a text dot annotation.

name: Annotation Style
purpose: Constructs/deconstructs an annotation (dimension) style.

name: Query Installed Fonts
purpose: Queries the fonts installed on the system.

name: Model Hatch
purpose: Creates a hatch fill from boundary curves and a pattern.

name: Query Model Hatch Patterns
purpose: Queries the Rhino document for hatch patterns.

name: Model Linetype
purpose: Constructs/deconstructs a Rhino linetype.
